content: Next.js App Router memoizes fetch across generateMetadata, layout, page and server components for the same request, so SEO data fetch and page data fetch dedupe. generateMetadata tracks runtime data access separately from the page. force-dynamic sets default fetch cache to no-store but leaves force-cache/revalidate fetches as-is. generateMetadata runs server-side before render; throwing in it can break the page response, so it must fail safe.
